name: code-to-speckit
description: Reverse-engineer existing codebases into evidence-backed Spec Kit documentation with Obsidian-friendly Markdown.

interface.shortDescription: Brownfield Spec Kit documentation from real code evidence.
interface.longDescription: Analyzes an existing codebase and produces evidence-backed, Obsidian-friendly Spec Kit documentation without inventing requirements.
defaultPrompt: Analyze this repo in brownfield mode and generate navigation hints.
Create a feature inventory with confidence and evidence.
Generate scope, trace, evidence, and spec docs for Authentication.
